market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate. Positive GEX across all expiries suppresses volatility despite pronounced bearish skew.
outlook.summary: Market at gamma equilibrium near 0DTE flip zone. Positive total GEX (2.08B) provides stability, but smirk skew (1.52-1.69) and elevated PCR indicate hedging pressure. Expect magnetic pull toward Max Pain 24090 with dealer support at structural PUT walls.

levels.motivazione: Significant CALL OI across all three expirations (196+213+407 = 816 total). Major resistance with dealer delta hedging supply above spot.
0DTE gamma equilibrium only 11 points above spot. Critical intraday pivot - break above targets 24300, failure triggers pullback to Max Pain.
Massive 4033 CALL OI in MONTHLY (largest single strike) combined with 0DTE PUT activity. Dealer gamma support concentration.
0DTE Max Pain 24 points below spot. Market maker target zone with strong magnetic attraction - primary downside target.
Extreme unusual activity: 922 VOL vs 58 OI (15.9x ratio). Aggressive hedging or directional PUT buying signals institutional concern.
Multi-expiry PUT concentration: 0DTE (379 OI + 1211 VOL) and MONTHLY (259 OI). Strong structural support with dealer defense expected.
Structural PUT wall across all expirations (104+40+1007 = 1151 total OI). Deep support with dealer gamma floor - final defense zone.
